definitions.description: Runs the flow on clicking a button in n8n

builderHint.searchHint: There can only be one manual trigger node per workflow

properties.displayName:
This node is where the workflow execution starts (when you click the ‘test’ button on the canvas).

Explore other ways to trigger your workflow (e.g on a schedule, or a webhook)
properties.name: notice

definitions.name: n8n-nodes-base.manualTrigger
